Services.title: Web Application Penetration Testing
Services.description: Identify vulnerabilities in customer-facing and internal web applications through comprehensive security assessments.

Services.title: API Security Testing
Services.description: Evaluate REST, GraphQL, and SOAP APIs for authentication, authorization, and business logic vulnerabilities.

Services.title: Network Penetration Testing
Services.description: Assess internal and external network infrastructure for exploitable security weaknesses.

Hero Title:
Web Application Security Assessment in Vancouver

Our security consultants perform comprehensive assessments based on the OWASP Top 10, identifying vulnerabilities such as SQL injection, XSS, authentication flaws, and business logic issues. We provide detailed remediation recommendations and executive reporting.
